## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss organic search attribution strategies and best practices for Yourco's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HubSpot CRM should be the primary source of truth for attribution, with GA4 used as a supplementary tool for trends and engagement metrics](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Implement event tracking based on form submission success rather than button clicks for more accurate conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Use a free-form field in forms asking "How did you hear about us?" to gather qualitative attribution insights](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Consider channel-specific attribution models (e.g., first-touch for blogs) rather than a one-size-fits-all approach](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

## Topics

### GA4 Limitations and Alternative Attribution Approaches

  - [GA4 rollout has been problematic, with issues in data accuracy and channel attribution](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Increasing prevalence of cookie blocking further complicates GA4 reliability](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Recommendation: Use CRM (e.g., HubSpot) as the primary source of truth for attribution](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Align segmentation and data collection with CRM to ensure consistency with sales team and executive reporting](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Conversion Tracking Best Practices

  - [Current method: Button click events in GA4, showing discrepancies (e.g., 2 leads from SEO, but 0 shown in filtered view)](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Recommended approach: Track form submission success events rather than button clicks](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Options for implementation:](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
    1.  Use a thank you page (easier but may overcount if page is refreshed)
    2.  Fire event on form submission success (technically preferred but may require more dev support)
  - [Utilize Google Tag Manager for easier implementation of tracking events](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Multi-Channel Attribution Strategies

  - [No perfect attribution model exists; awareness of limitations is key](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [For Yourco's current scale: Use a simplified approach combining HubSpot and GA data in a master spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [As channels increase: Consider more sophisticated multi-touch attribution models (e.g., first-touch, last-touch, or split)](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Channel-specific considerations:](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Blogs: Consider first-touch or any-touch attribution to capture top-of-funnel impact](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Evaluate content effectiveness by looking at its role in the overall customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Keyword and Content Performance Tracking

  - [Challenge: Google's encryption of keyword data limits direct keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Solution: Focus on page-level and topical analysis](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
    1.  Create a content inventory (e.g., in Airtable) with topical labeling
    2.  Cross-reference leads/conversions with touched pages
    3.  Use lookups and pivots to identify top-performing topics and content

### Qualitative Attribution Insights

  - [Implement a free-form field in forms asking "How did you hear about us?"](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
    1.  Provides more detailed, qualitative insights into attribution
    2.  Avoids bias introduced by pick lists or randomized options
  - [Challenge: Requires manual processing or potential AI-powered analysis to synthesize responses](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement form submission success event tracking in place of button click events](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Add a free-form "How did you hear about us?" field to lead capture forms](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Create a content inventory with topical labeling for improved content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Develop a process to correlate HubSpot lead data with GA engagement data for a more comprehensive view of the customer journey](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Explore HubSpot's built-in attribution reporting capabilities for a holistic view of channel performance](https://fathom.video/share/m4xnJCyjBKLNbACfPfsJZoxRVrHqg1QS?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
